title: Agora API keys should not be disclosed
description: Agora API keys should not be hardcoded in source code. These credentials include Agora App IDs, App Certificates, and temporary tokens that provide access to Agora's real-time engagement platform for video, audio, and messaging services. When exposed in code repositories, they can lead to unauthorized access to Agora services and potential misuse of communication resources.
recommendation: Store Agora API credentials securely using environment variables, secure configuration management, or Agora's recommended secure storage practices. Never commit App IDs, App Certificates, or tokens directly to source code repositories.
impact: Critical security risk - unauthorized access to Agora real-time communication services and potential abuse of video/audio resources

compliant.description: Using environment variable for Agora App ID

checks.message: Agora App ID or App Certificate detected in source code
Agora temporary token detected in source code
Potential Agora credential detected in source code
